results.transcript: Okay. Well, here's what's going on. I'm supposed to put together this CBT for the C.I.D. disaster science education for, and I've never done anything like this before, and I'm feeling kind of dumped on, and you know, I'm new to this role, and so I really want to make a good impression, and there's a lot of people, you know, expecting a lot from this, and so I really feel like I need help. Well, here's what you need to do. This is pretty basic, so all you need is you get together some voice talent, and you get the storyboard and a script together, and once you've gotten those together, then we can get you a little bit trained on the tool, and it's really all going to be okay.
